creator: numisemis@yahoo.com
text:
Unfortunatelly with this commit it doesn't build on
6.x anymore. I suppose the problem is with this part
of the Makefile (which was not in the PR):

+.if ${OSVERSION} < 500000
+CONST=
+.else
+CONST= const
+.endif
